data.title: Gencor Adjusts Shareholder Proposal Deadline for Meeting
data.description:

An announcement from Gencor ( (GENC) ) is now available.

Gencor Industries, Inc. has scheduled its Annual Meeting of Shareholders for September 26, 2025, following the fiscal year ended September 30, 2024. The company has set a new deadline for shareholder proposals due to the meeting date change, requiring submissions by July 28, 2025, to be included in the proxy materials. This adjustment affects the timeline for shareholder engagement and proposal submissions, ensuring compliance with SEC rules and the company’s By-Laws.

data.description:

  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Academy Metals ( (TSE:BFM) ) has provided an update.

Bedford Metals Corp. has announced the adjournment of its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders due to the lack of a quorum. The meeting has been rescheduled to July 25, 2025, and shareholders are encouraged to submit their proxies by July 23, 2025. The company has provided access to meeting details on its SEDAR+ profile and reassured shareholders that previously submitted proxies remain valid. This adjournment may impact the company’s shareholder engagement and decision-making processes.

data.title: Sunlink Declares Special Dividend Amid Merger Plans
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

The latest update is out from Sunlink Health Systems ( (SSY) ).

SunLink Health Systems has entered into an Amended and Restated Agreement and Plan of Merger with Regional Health Properties, which was further amended on June 22, 2025, to extend the termination date to August 11, 2025. The merger will result in SunLink merging into Regional, with Regional surviving, and includes provisions for special cash dividends to SunLink shareholders, subject to certain conditions and adjustments. On July 18, 2025, SunLink’s Board declared a special cash dividend of $0.10 per share, payable on July 30, 2025, but reserved the right to revoke it if the merger is not approved or if certain conditions are not met. The merger’s completion is contingent upon customary closing conditions, including shareholder approvals and regulatory clearances.

Spark’s Take on SSY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SSY is a Neutral.

Sunlink Health Systems exhibits significant financial challenges, particularly with negative cash flows and declining revenues, which weigh heavily on its overall score. The technical analysis shows positive momentum, suggesting some investor optimism, but the valuation remains unattractive with a negative P/E ratio. The absence of earnings call data and corporate events further limits insights into future growth prospects.

To see Spark’s full report on SSY stock, click here.

More about Sunlink Health Systems

SunLink Health Systems, Inc. is a Georgia-based corporation operating in the healthcare industry. The company focuses on providing health services and is involved in a merger agreement with Regional Health Properties, Inc., another Georgia corporation.

Average Trading Volume: 104,956

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $7.04M

data.title: Avanti Gold Completes $1.4 Million Private Placement and Expands Equity Incentive Plan
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Valorem Resources ( (TSE:AGC) ) has issued an update.

Avanti Gold Corp. has successfully closed the final tranche of a $1,400,000 private placement, issuing 14,799,927 units at $0.035 per unit. The proceeds will be used for the Misisi Gold Project in the Democratic Republic of Congo and general working capital. Key insiders participated in the offering, leading to a significant insider ownership stake. Additionally, the company granted 3,500,000 restricted share units under its Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan to directors, officers, and consultants, enhancing its equity compensation strategy.

More about Valorem Resources

Avanti Gold Corp. is a gold exploration company with a strong portfolio of projects in Africa. The company’s flagship asset is the Misisi Project in the Democratic Republic of Congo, which hosts the Akyanga gold deposit. This project encompasses three contiguous 30-year mining leases covering 133 square kilometers along the Kibara Gold Belt, known for significant gold deposits.

Average Trading Volume: 368,539

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$15.77M

data.title: Sg Blocks Enters Exchange Agreement with Investors
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Sg Blocks ( (SGBX) ) just unveiled an update.

On July 17, 2025, Sg Blocks entered into an Exchange Agreement with investors to conduct a voluntary security exchange transaction. This involved exchanging Series A and Series B Warrants for 60,000 shares of Series B Preferred Stock, with the rights and preferences outlined in a Certificate of Designation filed in Delaware. The company also entered a registration rights agreement to cover the resale of these securities. The Series B Preferred Stock features dividends, voting rights, liquidation preferences, and conversion options, with a commitment from the company to cease dilutive financing and focus on non-dilutive funding strategies to maintain shareholder value and comply with Nasdaq standards.

Spark’s Take on SGBX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SGBX is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges and concerning valuation metrics, slightly offset by strategic corporate activities that could potentially improve future prospects. The financial instability and potential delisting are the most significant risks, while acquisitions and financing agreements offer some hope for recovery.

REC Silicon ASA ( (RNWEF) ) has issued an announcement.

REC Silicon ASA has secured a USD 6.5 million short-term loan from Hanwha International LLC to address its immediate operational capital needs. Despite this financial support, the company anticipates requiring further financing to meet its debt and operational cash flow requirements, highlighting its reliance on major shareholder Hanwha or other capital sources.

REC Silicon is a leading producer of advanced silicon materials, providing high-purity silicon gases to the solar and electronics industries globally. With over 40 years of experience and proprietary technology, the company is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway, and is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange.
